relationship.improvement_proposal: Replay-visible proposed change derived from evaluation evidence.
relationship.improvement_review: Replay-visible assessment of the improvement proposal.
relationship.improvement_approval: Explicit human-authorized approve or reject decision.
relationship.implementation: Future governed execution path allowed only after approval.

constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance remains non-authoritative and cannot approve.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates evidence and records explicit human authorization.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not approval authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Improvement approval evidence must be append-only and reconstructable.

known_limits: Improvement Approval Runtime is not implemented.
Execution request creation from approved improvements is not implemented.
Approval does not implement, mutate, self-modify, or self-apply changes.
